category_sources: Official Infracost docs describe cloud cost estimates and FinOps checks in engineering workflows.

display_name_sources: Official docs and source_facts.name identify the project as Infracost/infracost.
docs_sources: Official Infracost docs page is a dedicated documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage points to the official Infracost docs URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/infracost/cli; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official Infracost docs describe cloud cost and FinOps workflow features.
